message:
feat(extras): add heatmap gradient and complete Scanline 2D rendering

charts.rs:
- Add heatmap_gradient() function for cold→hot color mapping
- 8-stop gradient: Navy→Blue→Teal→Green→Gold→Orange→Red→Pink
- Tests for boundary behavior and monotonicity

text_effects.rs (bd-3r87 completion):
- Implement Scanline effect for StyledMultiLine (2D char_color_2d)
- Row-based scanline dimming with scroll offset calculation
- Integrates with time-based animation and flicker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
